utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six of these items. Each is fully specified with detailed information: 
- property: contains type, price, currency, location, bedroom/bathroom count, accessibility features, maintenance level, condo fees, and availability (fully detailed). 
- financing: method, funding_source, status (fully specified). 
- legal_services: provider, cost, currency, services_included (fully specified). 
- moving_services: provider_type, service_level, cost, currency, inclusions, and accessibility_support (fully specified). 
- setup_services: package, cost, currency, included_utilities, setup_timeline_days (fully specified). 
- total_budget: property_price, legal_fees, moving_cost, utility_setup, estimated_total, currency (fully specified). 
Therefore, all 6 out of 6 required items are covered completely.
